author: Tomer S.
pros: easy to use to all level users wide scope on the interactions between the diffrens servers - user actions etc network consumption
cons: the corrections the program offers - need code expertise :-)

review_title: Complete monitoring portal, full of metrics for real time status check and historical investigation
description: Aimbetter console can be customized in alarm thresholds by You or Support Team to satisfy specific customer needs; this monitoring tool is quite complex and needs some time to clearly understand all metrics, but after a few hours of console utilization You have a complete and clear comprehension of what happens into Your databases: user activities, slow queries, deadlocks, blocking queries, bottlenecks, tempdb utilization, resource utilization, etc. Agent sends all the metrics captured to a remote server in cloud that preserve them for a long time; this permits to monitor from console real time events or historical events, for example during night or weekend, batch or maintenance activity, and to compare the same metric between two different time sample to understand its time trend evolution.
author: Alessandro L.
pros: My team choosed this tool to monitor a complex environment made of more than one hundred of databases allocated on a few SQL Server clustered istances that suffered many problems at the beginning. This tool is based on a SaaS solution in Cloud, so one single Aimbetter agent was installed on a third machine to monitor all these instances. Just after a couple of days of Aimbetter monitoring we were in condition to identify and classify hundreds of problems into our databases: syntax errors, security issues, bottlenecks, tempdb overload, deadlocks, etc.; we divided them in groups and forwaded one part to developers, the other to Database Administrators. Solved inital problems, now we are able to monitor in real time our instances and to analyze, troubleshoot and solve emerging problems a few time after an alarm reported by this tool.
cons: Into the console You will find two main sections: one is a dashboard useful for monitoring health status with alert and alarms, the other goes deeply into many specific areas of investigation, collecting a lot of parameters and their evolution; a little more attention to a cross drill down between alarms and metrics analysis could help to investigate faster and more clear.

description: Easy to use, very structured, long data loading times.
author: Vered M.
pros: I liked the organized structure, easy to use, user friendly - not complicated
cons: I didn't liked the performance. It takes a long time for the data to load.

review_title: Your crystal ball to seeing the real state of your database environment
description: With Aimbetter we are able to pinpoint bottlenecks in our database processing, refactor our code or procedures to provide better user experience and faster straight through processing - all of which help our business revenue.
author: Tony S.
pros: The Query Analyser is the piece de resistence in Aimbetter - being able to summarise all queries by execution count, resource profile and dig into the execution plan and underlying query, turns any user into an IT guru.
cons: The UI can feel cramped at times, particularly when one is two or three levels into a query analysis - but it's a minor frustration.

review_title: The perfect system to help IT on DBA and infrastructure
description: Using this service for so many years give me peace of mind. Any person in my IT department is using the system for his needs. Easy to understand. Show you the problems and most of the time the cuase
author: Hanan E.
pros: The information is very clear. You get the information alert to your mail and easyly log to the system and get a clear picture of the problem.
cons: The configuration of the allerts is not that easy.We have to get help from the support team.

author: Shaked M.
pros: It has really good support which is very welcoming , they are nice and helping a lot . Monitoring UI is really good , also getting mails on critical fails .
cons: I think the system is not 100% accurate on the seconds get info about monitoring . might be long refresh intervals . but I don't really find any major issue in the software. pretty stable and good to use honstly. If you are not familiar with SQL you can't use the software efficiently.

review_title: From knowing the AimBetter life is much easier
description: Ability to see the query on both the software side and the database side That way I have the ability to see if the problem is on the code side in the software or in the DataBase Or a user is performing an illegal action

pros: Very accurate monitoring of processes performed in the Databases At a very high level And very fast customer service at a high level
cons: I haven't found one yet but I'm sure I'll find one later

cons: nothing. Aimbetter is great. Professional DBAs can really benefit from it, and so can IT pros.

cons: Nothing, the current version is working amazing!

description: The system gives real-time alerts, almost without false alarms, Aimbetter's team intervenes in critical database failures, the system helped us improve the performance of the organization's core systems.
author: Leo K.
pros: Easy to install Immediate performance improvement Excellent monitoring Alerts without false alarms Excellent service
cons: Only on cloud, No have on-premise version

author: Dan B.
pros: Aimbetter is my go to tool to diagnose SQL health. It allows me to quickly evaluate if my issues are from lack of resources, IO bottlenecks, bad queries or missing indexes.
cons: I’m missing automated reports on server health compared to a baseline or even last week.
